unit.note: CI-config-only diff (.github/workflows/*.yml uses-line SHA pins + new .github/dependabot.yml). No TS/JS/Python source touched, so vitest/tsc/oxlint scope is unchanged. The verification layer for this change is YAML-parse validity + SHA resolution + grep (see test_completeness).

e2e.note: No product surface (web/cli/api) exercised; F0.5 surface=none, justified. The PR's own CI run (ci/security/pr-review/codeql) is the live end-to-end proof of the pinned actions.

surface_verification.justification: CI-config-only change; no product runtime surface. Real end-to-end proof is the PR's own CI run executing the pinned actions live.

test_completeness.enumeration_basis: Every behaviour this diff introduces, from the change's informal ACs: (a) workflows remain valid YAML after pinning, (b) each SHA maps to its declared version tag so the change is behavior-preserving, (c) the Semgrep mutable-action-tag surface is cleared, (d) the two pre-existing pins and (e) the permission-rationale comments are untouched, plus (f) live workflow execution and (g) Dependabot pickup which are only observable on GitHub. 7 behaviours; 5 tested locally; 2 untestable-locally (external GitHub service); 0 untested-testable.

behaviors.behavior: All 6 workflow YAMLs + the new dependabot.yml remain syntactically valid after the SHA-pin pass
behaviors.evidence: uv run --with pyyaml yaml.safe_load parsed all 7 files: ALL VALID

behaviors.behavior: Every pinned SHA resolves to its declared version tag (behavior-preserving: identical to the commit CI already ran)
behaviors.evidence: gh api repos/<action>/commits/<major-tag> -> pinned 40-hex SHA for all 7 refs: checkout v4.3.1, setup-node v4.4.0, setup-python v5.6.0, github-script v7.1.0, upload-artifact v4.6.2, codeql-action v3.37.1 (init/analyze) + v4.37.1 (upload-sarif)

behaviors.behavior: No mutable-tag uses: references remain — the Semgrep github-actions-mutable-action-tag surface (20 alerts) is cleared
The two pre-existing SHA-pins (svenroth-ai diff-coverage-gate, peter-evans create-or-update-comment) are unchanged
behaviors.evidence: grep confirmed both intact; diff is 27 uses-line changes, neither line touched

behaviors.behavior: The permission-rationale comments in security.yml (which mention actions by name) were not corrupted by the string-replace pass
behaviors.evidence: restored 2 mangled comment lines; grep for double-## mangled comments (#.*@<40hex> #) returns zero

behaviors.behavior: Workflows still trigger and the pinned actions execute successfully in CI
behaviors.reason: GitHub Actions runner is an external service; the PR's own ci/security/pr-review/codeql runs exercise the pinned actions live — observed post-push, the real end-to-end proof

behaviors.behavior: Dependabot detects the github-actions ecosystem and opens grouped weekly bump PRs
behaviors.reason: Dependabot is a GitHub-hosted service; config validity is checked via YAML parse, runtime pickup is observable only on GitHub after merge
